seoTitle: Maffra vs Magometon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maffra and Magometon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maffra and Magometon.
heading: Maffra vs Magometon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maffra, New South Wales and Magometon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maffra has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Magometon (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maffra or Magometon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maffra has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Magometon scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maffra scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Magometon scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maffra or Magometon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maffra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
